title: centaurea lanigera
intro: Centaurea lanigera, also known as woolly knapweed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea lanigera include its ability to soothe and calm skin conditions, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Centaurea lanigera can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
